chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 670 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 8585/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = The applicant’s counsel has been called on the last three dates of hearing including inter alia 17.11.2025, 24.11.2025 and once again today i.e. 01.12.2025. It appears from the perusal of impugned order dated 11.09.2025 that the applicant has challenged the confirmation of bail granted to the accused in a case registered with P.S Cantt: Hyderabad u/s 489-F PPC. The grounds for passing such orders confirming the bail are consistent with case law as well the facts of the case as narrated in the impugned bail confirmation order. Accordingly, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed alongwith listed application for the above reasons. JUDGE Tufail
